info.title: OneMoreTaskTracker Plan API
info.description: REST surface emitted by OneMoreTaskTracker.Api for the feature planning (Gantt) experience. Backed by gRPC into OneMoreTaskTracker.Features / .Tasks / .Users. All dates are ISO yyyy-MM-dd strings or null. Hand-rolled for iteration 1 of the feature-stage-planning feature (api-contract.md v1); Swashbuckle is a follow-up.

get.description: Anonymous, no upstream calls. Used by deployment + GAN harness (BE_HEALTH_URL).

get.summary: List features visible to the caller.
get.description: Optional `windowStart` / `windowEnd` query params (ISO yyyy-MM-dd) constrain results to features whose plan overlaps the window. Window semantics: `windowStart` is inclusive on `plannedEnd`; `windowEnd` is exclusive on `plannedStart`; features with null `plannedStart` and/or `plannedEnd` are always included. Bad date format or `windowStart > windowEnd` returns 400 `Invalid request data` and the upstream gRPC service is NOT called.

post.description: Creates the feature and atomically materializes 5 empty stage plans (one per FeatureState ordinal). `managerUserId` is derived from the caller's JWT and MUST NOT be sent in the body.

get.summary: Get a single feature with attached tasks, lead, mini-team, and resolved stage-plan performers.

patch.description: All body fields are optional — omitted means unchanged. When `stagePlans` is present it MUST contain exactly 5 entries, one per FeatureState value, in any order. The server re-orders canonically. Omitted stagePlans leaves existing plans untouched. Empty array (`[]`) is rejected with 400. Derived `plannedStart` / `plannedEnd` on the feature are recomputed server-side as min/max over populated stage dates.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Optional optimistic-concurrency token; current feature.version from the last read. Missing header = advisory mode (last-write-wins) in iter 1.

patch.summary: Update a feature's title in place (inline edit — Manager only).
patch.description: Trimmed server-side; 1..200 chars after trim. Empty or whitespace-only titles are rejected as 400. Returns the refreshed FeatureSummary with a bumped `version`.

patch.summary: Update a feature's description (inline edit — Manager only).
patch.description: 0..4000 chars after trim; empty or null clears the field. Leading whitespace preserved; trailing whitespace trimmed.

patch.summary: Reassign a single stage's owner (inline edit — Manager only).
patch.description: `stageOwnerUserId` must be null (clear) or a positive integer on the feature manager's roster. Role-prefixed naming per microservices/contracts.md. Stage path segment is case-insensitive (`development`, `Development`, `DEVELOPMENT` all canonicalise to the same FeatureState).

patch.summary: Update a single stage's planned start date (inline edit — Manager only).
patch.description: ISO yyyy-MM-dd string or null to clear. Year must be 2000..2100 inclusive (`Use a real release date` otherwise). Must be on or before the stage's existing plannedEnd when both are set. Cross-stage chronological order is enforced — violation returns 422 with `conflict.kind = 'overlap'` and `conflict.with` set to the neighbour stage. Stage path segment is case-insensitive. Derived feature.plannedStart recomputed server-side.

patch.summary: Update a single stage's planned end date (inline edit — Manager only).
patch.description: Symmetric to planned-start. Year must be 2000..2100 inclusive. Must be on or after the stage's existing plannedStart. Cross-stage chronological order is enforced — violation returns 422 with `conflict.kind = 'overlap'` and `conflict.with` set to the neighbour stage. Stage path segment is case-insensitive.

post.summary: Attach a task (by Jira id) to a feature (Manager only).

delete.summary: Detach a task from a feature, reassigning it to another feature (Manager only).

UnprocessableEntity.description: Validation error. On cross-stage chronological-order violations the body extends to `{ error, conflict: { kind: 'overlap' | 'order' | 'rangeInvalid', with: <stage> } }` so the FE can highlight the offending neighbour stage.

Conflict.description: Version mismatch (concurrent edit detected). Body includes a `conflict` object with `kind:'version'` and the server's current `currentVersion` when the handler reports a concurrency conflict.

ConflictError.description: Extended error envelope emitted on 409/422 when the handler reports a concurrency or stage-order conflict. Clients unaware of `conflict` fall back to the bare `error` string.

error.description: Public-facing message such as 'Updated by someone else' or 'Stage order violation'.

conflict.description: Structured conflict context. Absent when the upstream did not supply one.

StagePlan.description: List-row stage plan — id-only performer. `stageVersion` is rolled out additively (api-contract.md §rollout-tolerance) and is therefore NOT in the required set; old payloads that predate the inline-edit feature may omit it.

stageVersion.description: Per-stage optimistic-concurrency token; consumed by the FE inline editor's If-Match header for stage-scoped PATCHes.

StagePlanDetail.description: Detail stage plan — resolved performer mini-member. `performer` is null when the stage is unassigned OR when the stored performer id is no longer on the manager's roster (stale). In the stale case `performerUserId` is still emitted so the FE can render the 'Performer no longer on team' state.

stagePlans.description: Always length 5, canonical FeatureState order. Performer is id-only on list rows.

version.description: Monotonically-increasing row version used as an optimistic-concurrency token. Bumped by every inline-edit PATCH.

miniTeam.description: Deduped union of task assignees, lead, and every populated stage-plan performer.

stagePlans.description: Always length 5, canonical FeatureState order. Each entry carries a resolved performer mini-member.

plannedStart.description: Legacy feature-level date; prefer authoring per-stage plans via PATCH.

plannedEnd.description: Legacy feature-level date; prefer authoring per-stage plans via PATCH.

UpdateFeaturePayload.description: All fields optional. Omitted `stagePlans` means do-not-touch; when present MUST have exactly 5 entries with unique stage names.

UpdateStageOwnerPayload.description: Role-prefixed naming: `stageOwnerUserId` is an opaque cross-service reference to the Users service. Null clears the assignment.

surfaces.command: cd OneMoreTaskTracker.Features/Protos && for f in $(find . -name '*.proto' -type f | LC_ALL=C sort); do printf '=== %s ===\n' "$f"; cat "$f"; printf '\n'; done
ls OneMoreTaskTracker.Features/Migrations | LC_ALL=C sort | grep -E '^[0-9]+_.+\.cs$' | grep -v Designer
